step.title: Load changed files
step.action: Identify and read all files changed in the story implementation.

step.title: OWASP top 10 check
step.action: Check the implementation against the OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities: injection, broken auth, sensitive data exposure, XXE, broken access control, misconfiguration, XSS, deserialization, known vulnerabilities, insufficient logging.

step.title: Dependency scan
step.action: Scan dependencies for known vulnerabilities using CVE databases.

step.title: Secrets check
step.action: Verify no secrets, API keys, tokens, or credentials are hardcoded in the implementation.

step.title: Produce security report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with security findings.
